mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUDIT_EVENT ( AUDIT_ID, TRACE_ID, REQUEST_ID, ACTOR_ID, ACTOR_ROLE, MENU_CODE, PAGE_ID, ACTION_CODE, ENTITY_TYPE, ENTITY_ID, BEFORE_SUMMARY, AFTER_SUMMARY, RESULT_STATUS, REASON_SUMMARY, IP_ADDRESS, USER_AGENT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{auditId}, #{traceId}, #{requestId}, #{actorId}, #{actorRole}, #{menuCode}, #{pageId}, #{actionCode}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{beforeSummaryJson}, #{afterSummaryJson}, #{resultStatus}, #{reasonSummary}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, CURRENT_DATETIME )

INSERT INTO TRACE_EVENT ( EVENT_ID, TRACE_ID, SPAN_ID, PARENT_SPAN_ID, EVENT_TYPE, PAGE_ID, COMPONENT_ID, FUNCTION_ID, API_ID, RESULT_CODE, DURATION_MS, PAYLOAD_SUMMARY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{traceId}, #{spanId}, #{parentSpanId}, #{eventType}, #{pageId}, #{componentId}, #{functionId}, #{apiId}, #{resultCode}, #{durationMs}, #{payloadSummaryJson}, CURRENT_DATETIME )

INSERT INTO ACCESS_EVENT ( EVENT_ID, TRACE_ID, REQUEST_ID, PAGE_ID, API_ID, REQUEST_URI, HTTP_METHOD, FEATURE_TYPE, ACTOR_ID, ACTOR_TYPE, ACTOR_ROLE, ACTOR_INSTT_ID, COMPANY_CONTEXT_ID, TARGET_COMPANY_CONTEXT_ID, REMOTE_ADDR, RESPONSE_STATUS, DURATION_MS, REQUEST_CONTENT_TYPE, QUERY_STRING, PARAMETER_SUMMARY, ERROR_MESSAGE, COMPANY_SCOPE_DECISION, COMPANY_SCOPE_REASON, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{eventId}, #{traceId}, #{requestId}, #{pageId}, #{apiId}, #{requestUri}, #{httpMethod}, #{featureType}, #{actorId}, #{actorType}, #{actorRole}, #{actorInsttId}, #{companyContextId}, #{targetCompanyContextId}, #{remoteAddr}, #{responseStatus}, #{durationMs}, #{requestContentType}, #{queryString}, #{parameterSummary}, #{errorMessage}, #{companyScopeDecision}, #{companyScopeReason}, CURRENT_DATETIME )

INSERT INTO ERROR_EVENT ( ERROR_ID, TRACE_ID, REQUEST_ID, PAGE_ID, API_ID, SOURCE_TYPE, ERROR_TYPE, ACTOR_ID, ACTOR_ROLE, ACTOR_INSTT_ID, REQUEST_URI, REMOTE_ADDR, MESSAGE, STACK_SUMMARY, RESULT_STATUS, USER_AGENT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{errorId}, #{traceId}, #{requestId}, #{pageId}, #{apiId}, #{sourceType}, #{errorType}, #{actorId}, #{actorRole}, #{actorInsttId}, #{requestUri}, #{remoteAddr}, #{message}, #{stackSummary}, #{resultStatus}, #{userAgent}, CURRENT_DATETIME )

where.if: AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(REASON_SUMMARY, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(ENTITY_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(ACTOR_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' )

AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(COMPONENT_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(FUNCTION_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(API_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' )

AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(REQUEST_URI, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(ACTOR_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(REMOTE_ADDR, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(ACTOR_INSTT_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(COMPANY_CONTEXT_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(TARGET_COMPANY_CONTEXT_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' )

AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(MESSAGE, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(REQUEST_URI, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(ACTOR_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(PAGE_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(API_ID, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT AUDIT_ID AS auditId, TRACE_ID AS traceId, REQUEST_ID AS requestId, ACTOR_ID AS actorId, ACTOR_ROLE AS actorRole, MENU_CODE AS menuCode, PAGE_ID AS pageId, ACTION_CODE AS actionCode, ENTITY_TYPE AS entityType, ENTITY_ID AS entityId, BEFORE_SUMMARY AS beforeSummaryJson, AFTER_SUMMARY AS afterSummaryJson, RESULT_STATUS AS resultStatus, REASON_SUMMARY AS reasonSummary, IP_ADDRESS AS ipAddress, USER_AGENT AS userAgent, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM AUDIT_EVENT
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT EVENT_ID AS eventId, TRACE_ID AS traceId, REQUEST_ID AS requestId, PAGE_ID AS pageId, API_ID AS apiId, REQUEST_URI AS requestUri, HTTP_METHOD AS httpMethod, FEATURE_TYPE AS featureType, ACTOR_ID AS actorId, ACTOR_TYPE AS actorType, ACTOR_ROLE AS actorRole, ACTOR_INSTT_ID AS actorInsttId, COMPANY_CONTEXT_ID AS companyContextId, TARGET_COMPANY_CONTEXT_ID AS targetCompanyContextId, REMOTE_ADDR AS remoteAddr, RESPONSE_STATUS AS responseStatus, DURATION_MS AS durationMs, REQUEST_CONTENT_TYPE AS requestContentType, QUERY_STRING AS queryString, PARAMETER_SUMMARY AS parameterSummary, ERROR_MESSAGE AS errorMessage, COMPANY_SCOPE_DECISION AS companyScopeDecision, COMPANY_SCOPE_REASON AS companyScopeReason, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM ACCESS_EVENT
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT ERROR_ID AS errorId, TRACE_ID AS traceId, REQUEST_ID AS requestId, PAGE_ID AS pageId, API_ID AS apiId, SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, ERROR_TYPE AS errorType, ACTOR_ID AS actorId, ACTOR_ROLE AS actorRole, ACTOR_INSTT_ID AS actorInsttId, REQUEST_URI AS requestUri, REMOTE_ADDR AS remoteAddr, MESSAGE AS message, STACK_SUMMARY AS stackSummary, RESULT_STATUS AS resultStatus, USER_AGENT AS userAgent, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM ERROR_EVENT
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT EVENT_ID AS eventId, TRACE_ID AS traceId, SPAN_ID AS spanId, PARENT_SPAN_ID AS parentSpanId, EVENT_TYPE AS eventType, PAGE_ID AS pageId, COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, FUNCTION_ID AS functionId, API_ID AS apiId, RESULT_CODE AS resultCode, DURATION_MS AS durationMs, PAYLOAD_SUMMARY AS payloadSummaryJson, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt FROM TRACE_EVENT
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT PAGE_ID AS pageId, PAGE_NAME AS pageName, ROUTE_PATH AS routePath, DOMAIN_CODE AS domainCode, MENU_CODE AS menuCode, LAYOUT_VERSION AS layoutVersion, DESIGN_TOKEN_VERSION AS designTokenVersion, ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn FROM UI_PAGE_MANIFEST WHERE PAGE_ID = #{value}

SELECT PAGE_ID AS pageId, PAGE_NAME AS pageName, ROUTE_PATH AS routePath, DOMAIN_CODE AS domainCode, MENU_CODE AS menuCode, LAYOUT_VERSION AS layoutVersion, DESIGN_TOKEN_VERSION AS designTokenVersion, ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn FROM UI_PAGE_MANIFEST WHERE COALESCE(ACTIVE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY DOMAIN_CODE ASC, ROUTE_PATH ASC, PAGE_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UI_PAGE_MANIFEST ( PAGE_ID, PAGE_NAME, ROUTE_PATH, DOMAIN_CODE, MENU_CODE, LAYOUT_VERSION, DESIGN_TOKEN_VERSION, ACTIVE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{pageId}, #{pageName}, #{routePath}, #{domainCode}, #{menuCode}, #{layoutVersion}, #{designTokenVersion}, #{activeYn}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE UI_PAGE_MANIFEST SET PAGE_NAME = #{pageName}, ROUTE_PATH = #{routePath}, DOMAIN_CODE = #{domainCode}, MENU_CODE = #{menuCode}, LAYOUT_VERSION = #{layoutVersion}, DESIGN_TOKEN_VERSION = #{designTokenVersion}, ACTIVE_YN = #{activeYn}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UI_COMPONENT_REGISTRY ( COMPONENT_ID, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_TYPE, OWNER_DOMAIN, PROPS_SCHEMA_JSON, DESIGN_REFERENCE, ACTIVE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{componentId}, #{componentName}, #{componentType}, #{ownerDomain}, #{propsSchemaJson}, #{designReference}, #{activeYn}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.select: SELECT COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, COMPONENT_NAME AS componentName, COMPONENT_TYPE AS componentType, OWNER_DOMAIN AS ownerDomain, PROPS_SCHEMA_JSON AS propsSchemaJson, DESIGN_REFERENCE AS designReference, ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS updatedAt FROM UI_COMPONENT_REGISTRY WHERE COMPONENT_ID = #{value}

SELECT COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, COMPONENT_NAME AS componentName, COMPONENT_TYPE AS componentType, OWNER_DOMAIN AS ownerDomain, PROPS_SCHEMA_JSON AS propsSchemaJson, DESIGN_REFERENCE AS designReference, ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS updatedAt FROM UI_COMPONENT_REGISTRY ORDER BY COMPONENT_TYPE ASC, COMPONENT_ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE UI_COMPONENT_REGISTRY SET COMPONENT_NAME = #{componentName}, COMPONENT_TYPE = #{componentType}, OWNER_DOMAIN = #{ownerDomain}, PROPS_SCHEMA_JSON = #{propsSchemaJson}, DESIGN_REFERENCE = #{designReference}, ACTIVE_YN = #{activeYn}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE COMPONENT_ID = #{componentId}
UPDATE UI_PAGE_COMPONENT_MAP SET COMPONENT_ID = #{toComponentId}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE COMPONENT_ID = #{fromComponentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UI_PAGE_COMPONENT_MAP ( MAP_ID, PAGE_ID, LAYOUT_ZONE, COMPONENT_ID, INSTANCE_KEY, DISPLAY_ORDER, CONDITIONAL_RULE_SUMMARY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{mapId}, #{pageId}, #{layoutZone}, #{componentId}, #{instanceKey}, #{displayOrder}, #{conditionalRuleSummary}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.select: SELECT MAP.MAP_ID AS mapId, MAP.PAGE_ID AS pageId, MAP.LAYOUT_ZONE AS layoutZone, MAP.COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, MAP.INSTANCE_KEY AS instanceKey, MAP.DISPLAY_ORDER AS displayOrder, MAP.CONDITIONAL_RULE_SUMMARY AS conditionalRuleSummary, REG.COMPONENT_NAME AS componentName, REG.COMPONENT_TYPE AS componentType, REG.OWNER_DOMAIN AS ownerDomain, REG.PROPS_SCHEMA_JSON AS propsSchemaJson, REG.DESIGN_REFERENCE AS designReference FROM UI_PAGE_COMPONENT_MAP MAP LEFT JOIN UI_COMPONENT_REGISTRY REG ON MAP.COMPONENT_ID = REG.COMPONENT_ID WHERE MAP.PAGE_ID = #{value} ORDER BY MAP.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, MAP.INSTANCE_KEY ASC

SELECT MAN.PAGE_ID AS pageId, MAN.PAGE_NAME AS pageName, MAN.ROUTE_PATH AS routePath, MAN.MENU_CODE AS menuCode, MAP.LAYOUT_ZONE AS layoutZone, MAP.COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, MAP.INSTANCE_KEY AS instanceKey, MAP.DISPLAY_ORDER AS displayOrder, MAP.CONDITIONAL_RULE_SUMMARY AS conditionalRuleSummary FROM UI_PAGE_COMPONENT_MAP MAP INNER JOIN UI_PAGE_MANIFEST MAN ON MAP.PAGE_ID = MAN.PAGE_ID WHERE MAP.COMPONENT_ID = #{value} ORDER BY MAN.PAGE_ID ASC, MAP.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, MAP.INSTANCE_KEY ASC
